name: Baked Citrus Swordfish
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Citrus Barbecue Sauce and set aside.
2. You can use swordfish or salmon steaks, but each should be about 1-inch thick and weigh about 5 ounces each.
3. Heat oven to 450 degrees F.
4. Place fish steaks in an ungreased rectangular baking dish, 13 X 9 X 2-inches.
5. Pour 1 cup of the sauce over the fish.
6. Bake, uncovered, until the fish flakes easily with a fork, 20 to 25 minutes.
7. Serve with remaining Citrus Barbecue Sauce.
